MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT

This Master Services Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into by and between
Acme Corporation and Beta LLC.

1. Term. The initial term of this Agreement is three (3) years from the Effective Date.

2. Governing Law. This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance
with the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to its conflict of laws principles.

3. Confidentiality. Each party shall keep confidential all proprietary information.
